parameters.query: UPDATE oms.sync_progress SET status='pending', started_at=NULL, error_message=NULL WHERE status='running' AND started_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' AND company_code = current_setting('app.company_code')

UPDATE oms.sync_progress SET status='running', started_at=NOW(), error_message=NULL WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM oms.sync_progress WHERE status='pending' AND company_code=current_setting('app.company_code') ORDER BY doc_type, month_start FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT 1) RETURNING id, doc_type, month_start::text, month_end::text, company_code, row_count AS prev_row_count, sap_count AS prev_sap_count, last_anchor_date::text AS anchor_date, completed_at::text AS prev_completed_at

parameters.jsCode: return { json: { done: true, message: 'No pending batches' } };

parameters.query:
-- 1. 超时 syncing → error (15分钟)
UPDATE oms.orders SET sync_status = 'error'
WHERE company_code = current_setting('app.company_code')
  AND sync_status = 'syncing'
  AND updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes';

-- 2. 行数不一致告警 (去重: 同 order_id 1小时内不重复)
INSERT INTO oms.wms_alerts (company_code, alert_type, severity, source, message, context)
SELECT o.company_code, 'LINE_COUNT_MISMATCH', 'warning', 'wf20a',
       'expected=' || o.expected_line_count || ' actual=' || COUNT(ol.id),
       jsonb_build_object('order_id', o.id, 'doc_type', o.doc_type, 'doc_number', o.doc_number,
                          'expected', o.expected_line_count, 'actual', COUNT(ol.id))
FROM oms.orders o
LEFT JOIN oms.order_lines ol ON ol.order_id = o.id AND ol.company_code = o.company_code
WHERE o.company_code = current_setting('app.company_code')
  AND o.sync_status = 'complete'
  AND o.expected_line_count IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.id, o.company_code, o.doc_type, o.doc_number, o.expected_line_count
HAVING COUNT(ol.id) != o.expected_line_count
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM oms.wms_alerts a
    WHERE a.company_code = o.company_code
      AND a.alert_type = 'LINE_COUNT_MISMATCH'
      AND a.context->>'order_id' = o.id::text
      AND a.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
  );

SELECT 'monitor_done' AS status;
UPDATE oms.sync_progress SET status='completed', completed_at=NOW(), context=jsonb_build_object('skipped', true, 'reason', 'sap_count_matches', 'prev_row_count', $1, 'ts', NOW()::text) WHERE id=$2

SET NOCOUNT ON;
SELECT 'SO' AS doc_type,
  T0.DocEntry AS sap_doc_entry, T0.DocNum AS sap_doc_num,
  T0.CardCode AS business_partner, T0.CardName AS bp_name,
  T0.DocDate AS doc_date, T0.DocDueDate AS due_date,
  T0.DocStatus AS sap_status, T0.CANCELED AS sap_cancelled,
  T0.DocTotal AS doc_total, T0.DocCur AS doc_currency,
  CONVERT(varchar, T0.UpdateDate, 23) AS sap_update_date,
  STUFF(STUFF(RIGHT('000000'+CAST(T0.UpdateTS AS VARCHAR),6),5,0,':'),3,0,':') AS sap_update_time,
  T1.LineNum AS line_num, T1.ItemCode AS item_code,
  T1.Dscription AS item_name, T1.Quantity AS quantity,
  T1.OpenQty AS open_quantity, T1.DelivrdQty AS delivered_qty,
  T1.WhsCode AS warehouse_code,
  T1.UomCode AS uom, CONVERT(varchar, T1.ShipDate, 23) AS ship_date,
  NULL AS header_item_code, NULL AS header_item_name,
  CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL) AS header_planned_qty, CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL) AS header_actual_qty,
  NULL AS header_warehouse,
  NULL AS header_from_warehouse, NULL AS header_to_warehouse, NULL AS line_from_warehouse, NULL AS item_type
FROM ORDR T0 WITH (NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN RDR1 T1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T0.DocEntry = T1.DocEntry
WHERE T0.UpdateDate BETWEEN '{{ $('参数校验').first().json.effective_start }}' AND '{{ $('参数校验').first().json.month_end }}'

SET NOCOUNT ON;
SELECT 'PO' AS doc_type,
  T0.DocEntry AS sap_doc_entry, T0.DocNum AS sap_doc_num,
  T0.CardCode AS business_partner, T0.CardName AS bp_name,
  T0.DocDate AS doc_date, T0.DocDueDate AS due_date,
  T0.DocStatus AS sap_status, T0.CANCELED AS sap_cancelled,
  T0.DocTotal AS doc_total, T0.DocCur AS doc_currency,
  CONVERT(varchar, T0.UpdateDate, 23) AS sap_update_date,
  STUFF(STUFF(RIGHT('000000'+CAST(T0.UpdateTS AS VARCHAR),6),5,0,':'),3,0,':') AS sap_update_time,
  T1.LineNum AS line_num, T1.ItemCode AS item_code,
  T1.Dscription AS item_name, T1.Quantity AS quantity,
  T1.OpenQty AS open_quantity, T1.DelivrdQty AS delivered_qty,
  T1.WhsCode AS warehouse_code,
  T1.UomCode AS uom, NULL AS ship_date,
  NULL AS header_item_code, NULL AS header_item_name,
  CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL) AS header_planned_qty, CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL) AS header_actual_qty,
  NULL AS header_warehouse,
  NULL AS header_from_warehouse, NULL AS header_to_warehouse, NULL AS line_from_warehouse, NULL AS item_type
FROM OPOR T0 WITH (NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN POR1 T1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T0.DocEntry = T1.DocEntry
WHERE T0.UpdateDate BETWEEN '{{ $('参数校验').first().json.effective_start }}' AND '{{ $('参数校验').first().json.month_end }}'

SET NOCOUNT ON;
SELECT 'WO' AS doc_type,
  T0.DocEntry AS sap_doc_entry, CAST(T0.DocNum AS VARCHAR(50)) AS sap_doc_num,
  '' AS business_partner, '' AS bp_name,
  T0.PostDate AS doc_date, T0.DueDate AS due_date,
  T0.Status AS sap_status, CASE WHEN T0.Status = 'C' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS sap_cancelled,
  0 AS doc_total, '' AS doc_currency,
  CONVERT(varchar, T0.UpdateDate, 23) AS sap_update_date,
  STUFF(STUFF(RIGHT('000000'+CAST(T0.UpdateTS AS VARCHAR),6),5,0,':'),3,0,':') AS sap_update_time,
  T1.LineNum AS line_num, T1.ItemCode AS item_code,
  T1.ItemName AS item_name, T1.BaseQty AS quantity,
  T1.BaseQty - T1.IssuedQty AS open_quantity, T1.IssuedQty AS issued_qty,
  0 AS delivered_qty, T1.wareHouse AS warehouse_code,
  T1.UomCode AS uom, NULL AS ship_date,
  T0.ItemCode AS header_item_code, T0.ProdName AS header_item_name,
  T0.PlannedQty AS header_planned_qty, T0.CmpltQty AS header_actual_qty,
  T0.Warehouse AS header_warehouse,
  NULL AS header_from_warehouse, NULL AS header_to_warehouse, NULL AS line_from_warehouse, T1.ItemType AS item_type
FROM OWOR T0 WITH (NOLOCK)
LEFT JOIN WOR1 T1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T0.DocEntry = T1.DocEntry
WHERE T0.UpdateDate BETWEEN '{{ $('参数校验').first().json.effective_start }}' AND '{{ $('参数校验').first().json.month_end }}'

SET NOCOUNT ON;
SELECT 'TR' AS doc_type,
  T0.DocEntry AS sap_doc_entry, T0.DocNum AS sap_doc_num,
  T0.CardCode AS business_partner, T0.CardName AS bp_name,
  T0.DocDate AS doc_date, T0.DocDueDate AS due_date,
  T0.DocStatus AS sap_status, T0.CANCELED AS sap_cancelled,
  T0.DocTotal AS doc_total, T0.DocCur AS doc_currency,
  CONVERT(varchar, T0.UpdateDate, 23) AS sap_update_date,
  STUFF(STUFF(RIGHT('000000'+CAST(T0.UpdateTS AS VARCHAR),6),5,0,':'),3,0,':') AS sap_update_time,
  T1.LineNum AS line_num, T1.ItemCode AS item_code,
  T1.Dscription AS item_name, T1.Quantity AS quantity,
  T1.OpenQty AS open_quantity, 0 AS delivered_qty, 0 AS issued_qty,
  T1.WhsCode AS warehouse_code,
  T1.UomCode AS uom, NULL AS ship_date,
  NULL AS header_item_code, NULL AS header_item_name,
  CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL) AS header_planned_qty, CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL) AS header_actual_qty,
  NULL AS header_warehouse,
  T0.Filler AS header_from_warehouse, T0.ToWhsCode AS header_to_warehouse,
  T1.FromWhsCod AS line_from_warehouse
FROM OWTQ T0 WITH (NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN WTQ1 T1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON T0.DocEntry = T1.DocEntry
WHERE T0.UpdateDate BETWEEN '{{ $('参数校验').first().json.effective_start }}' AND '{{ $('参数校验').first().json.month_end }}'

UPDATE oms.sync_progress sp SET status='completed', row_count=$1, completed_at=NOW(), last_anchor_date=(SELECT MAX(o.sap_update_date) FROM oms.orders o WHERE o.company_code=current_setting('app.company_code') AND o.doc_type=sp.doc_type AND o.sap_update_date BETWEEN sp.month_start AND sp.month_end), context=$2::jsonb WHERE sp.id=$3

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('汇总结果').first().json.count, $('汇总结果').first().json.context, $('汇总结果').first().json.task_id] }}

parameters.query: UPDATE oms.sync_progress SET status='completed', row_count=0, completed_at=NOW(), context=jsonb_build_object('skipped', false, 'reason', 'no_sap_data', 'ts', NOW()::text) WHERE id=$1
UPDATE oms.sync_progress SET status='failed', error_message=$1 WHERE id=$2
